zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Corbet於1114年出生在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛時，他的父親William Corbet Lord of Worthen25歲，母親Isabel de Valletort25歲。他於1150年與Ana d'Umfraville在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1180年在他的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Corbet于1114年出生在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛时，他的父亲William Corbet Lord of Worthen25岁，母亲Isabel de Valletort25岁。他于1150年与Ana d'Umfraville在英国苏格兰洛包爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1180年在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Corbet was born in 1114, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, his father, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, was 25 and his mother, Isabel de Valletort, was 25. He married Ana d'Umfraville in 1150, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1180, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Corbet est né en 1114, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Valletort, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ana d'Umfraville en 1150, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1180, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Corbet 1114 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Corbet Lord of Worthen 25 und seine Mutter Isabel de Valletort 25. Er hat 1150 in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Ana d'Umfraville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1180 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Corbet è nato il nel 1114 nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Valletort, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ana d'Umfraville nel 1150, nel Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1180, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Corbetが1114年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウで生まれた時，父William Corbet Lord of Worthenは25歳，母Isabel de Valletortは25歳であった。1150年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアでAna d'Umfravilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1180年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Corbet(이)가 1114년 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Corbet Lord of Worthen(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Valletort(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1150년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 Ana d'Umfraville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Corbet nasceu em 1114, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Valletort, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ana d'Umfraville em 1150, em Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1180, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Corbet родился в 1114 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Corbet Lord of Worthen было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Valletort, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ana d'Umfraville в 1150 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1180 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Corbet nació en 1114, en Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabel de Valletort, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ana d'Umfraville en 1150, en Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1180, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
